failures.description: The agent invented/altered the answer by reporting 9 options and a fake record id, instead of using the tool result showing 2 matching items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to answer from ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The tool output at index 3 returned exactly 2 available bagged Vacuum Cleaner items priced above 591.59, with item_ids 1345513440 and 2872451762. At index 4, the Executor produced unsupported information: 'There are 9 options available, per record 0000000000.' The count 9 and record 0000000000 are absent from the tool result and directly contradict the available evidence. This was not resolved later; the Evaluator approved the incorrect answer instead of correcting it.
